# matchPrefixSingle(_:)

**Instance Method**

Match the specified string prefix value against a string value (not an array).

## Declaration

```swift
func matchPrefixSingle(_ value: String) -> EntitlementsQuery
```

## Discussion

Strings are matched byte for byte (i.e. no unicode normalization occurs).
